dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 974 EH: Providing for a committee to notify the President of the assembly of the House of Representatives.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Providing for a committee to notify the President of the assembly of the House of Representatives.

section.text: That a committee of two Members be appointed by the Speaker to notify the President of the United States that a quorum of the House has assembled and that the House is ready to receive any communication that he may be pleased to make.
